series_metadata.series_description: Completed by an authorized permit technician to approve after-hours emergency requests. Lists dates of move, company, type of equipment, destination "from" and "to",routes, time call was received, time leaving and OSHP Dispatcher notified. Also substantiates compensatory time earned by Technician receiving the call.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: scanned images two years current year ; Paper: paper documents scanned
